settings.testimonial_description: I recommend Factor to all my clients who struggle with meal prep. The nutritional balance is spot-on.

settings.text: Factor Form is a line of premium supplements designed by dietitians and grounded in food science to support your daily nutrition goals.

settings.heading: How do I take the supplements?

settings.text: Each product comes with clear dosage instructions. Most supplements can be taken daily with water or mixed into your favorite beverage.
